description: minimal time-resolved pledge with deterministic chain_state mechanism, no counterparty, no dispute path

inputs.proposition: I will not spend the bonded UTXO before block 920000.

expected.canonical_message:
oc-pledge/v1
swearer: bc1qalice000000000000000000000000000000000
proposition: I will not spend the bonded UTXO before block 920000.
resolution:
  mechanism: chain_state
  query: address(bc1qalice000000000000000000000000000000000).utxo_count >= 1 AND address(bc1qalice000000000000000000000000000000000).balance >= 500000
resolves_at:
  block: 920000
expires_at: 2026-12-31T00:00:00Z
bond:
  attestation_id: 1111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111
  min_sats: 500000
  min_days: 180
counterparty: null
dispute:
  mechanism: null
  params: null
remediation: breach_recorded
sworn_at: 2026-04-24T18:30:00Z
nonce: 0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef

envelope.proposition: I will not spend the bonded UTXO before block 920000.
